content.en:
"The Black Zone is the Primordial Black Sea!"

The Lord of the Ancient said.

"Primordial Black Sea?" Ye Tian heard this name for the first time, so he didn't disturb the Lord of Canggu and continued to listen.

The Lord of the Ancient continued: "The Primordial Black Sea is not a heaven and earth similar to the end of the realm and the Extreme Path Deep Sea, but the end of all time and space. The End of the Realm is huge, and if you fly at the Edge of the Realm, even if you are a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm like the Lord of the White Night, it will take a long time to hurry. If you can travel from the Primordial Black Sea, the distance will be reduced by countless times, and you can even easily enter the Extreme Deep Sea through the Primordial Black Sea without anyone detecting it. Of course, it is too difficult to comprehend the extreme path of time and space in the extreme realm. "

"If you don't comprehend the extreme path of time and space in the extreme realm, and comprehend other extreme paths, you can also escape into the Black Sea of the extreme path for a short time, and you won't be able to last long. If a True Realm Perfect Controller comprehends the Extreme Path of an Extreme Realm, even if he is facing an extremely powerful Extreme Realm Perfect Master, as long as the other party does not comprehend the Extreme Realm Extreme Realm, he can escape from the other party's hands. "

"Of course, the Primordial Black Sea is naturally not just a little useful for hurrying, but you can also build your own dojo in the Primordial Black Sea, the primordial Black Sea is also boundless, if you build a dojo, only you can know the location, and others don't know. Therefore, once you place your treasure in the Primordial Black Sea, other powerhouses will not be able to find it. It's like the perfect controller of the extreme realm at the end of our realm, if he comprehends the extreme path of time and space in the extreme realm, and his true body is hidden in the deep sea of the extreme realm, then he will never die, and the most terrifying person has no way to kill people across the primordial black sea. Therefore, countless cultivators want to comprehend the extreme path of time and space in the extreme realm, and once they comprehend it, they will almost never die. "

"In addition, the Primordial Black Sea will also give birth to resources similar to the Extreme Mangscan White Grass, but unfortunately, if you can't comprehend the Extreme Dao of time and space in the Extreme Realm, you won't be able to stay in the Primordial Black Sea for a long time, so it's too difficult to find resources in the Primordial Black Sea!"

After the Lord of the Ancient Beings said this, Ye Tian roughly knew the origin of the Primordial Black Sea.

"At the end of the endless time and space, if I comprehend the extreme path of time and space, I can build a dojo in the primordial Black Sea, so that a replica body can stay there forever, and no one can kill me anymore, no means will work. Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, if he comprehended the Extreme Path of Light of the Extreme Realm, he could also enter the Primordial Black Sea for a short time.

"It seems that we have to improve the Extreme Dao of Light as soon as possible, if you comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light, in the face of a powerful enemy, you can also escape into the Primordial Black Sea and flee for your life!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although he is not afraid of death, if he gets the treasure but can't escape, it will be a big loss.

Therefore, comprehending the extreme path of light in the extreme realm is also a hole card to save life.

After chatting with the Lord of Canggu for a while, Ye Tian left.

"Ye Tian is becoming more and more demonic, not long after he became the perfect controller of the Void Realm, he has created a top-level Extreme Dao Control Technique! It seems that he has at least comprehended the limit of a Perfection Realm, otherwise he would not have created a top-level Extreme Dao Control Technique so quickly!"

The Lord of the Ancient Heavens secretly said.

You know, it was when he was about to break through to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller that he created a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique!

"Can't compare!"

The Lord of the Ancient sighed.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian comprehended other extreme paths, and only by cultivating other extreme paths to the realm of Xiaocheng or even Dacheng could he feed back the Endless Extreme Dao and let the Endless Extreme Dao continue to improve, so as to reach the Dacheng realm.

Therefore, the thing of attaining the ultimate path must be done all the time.

It's a pity that he doesn't have treasures like the Extreme Dao Monument of Time and Space, the Golden Extreme Dao Monument, or the Extreme Mangbai Grass, and he hasn't found other Extreme Dao Ancestors, otherwise it would be easy to comprehend other Extreme Dao.

Time flies, and hundreds of millions of eternal years have passed.

In such a short period of time, Ye Tian naturally did not make much progress.

On this day, however, good news came.

Extreme deep sea.

Ye Tian got the news that a Extreme Dao Creature who was at the peak of the True Realm Perfection was about to fall, and it was said that the injury was too serious to be cured at all, so it was forcibly dragged along.

Now, the other party is going to sell all the treasures on his body, exchange them for Extreme Dao coins and deposit them in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, and leave them for the descendants of the bloodline.

As for why he didn't leave the treasures on his body to his bloodline descendants, he was afraid that people would snatch them and kill his bloodline descendants.

After all, his bloodline descendants were too weak to keep these treasures at all.

And the Extreme Deep Sea doesn't pay attention to any rules, killing is too normal.

If you leave the treasure to the bloodline, you will kill the bloodline.

Therefore, this Extreme Dao creature exchanged the treasures on his body for Extreme Dao Coins, and sold them publicly, which is to tell other Extreme Dao creatures that his treasures have been taken out, exchanged for Extreme Dao Coins, and deposited in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, so everyone should not target his bloodline descendants.

And if the Extreme Dao Coin is deposited in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, other Extreme Dao creatures can't take it away, only his bloodline descendants can take it, and as long as some restrictions are set, such as every time his bloodline descendant improves a realm, he can take away a part of the Extreme Dao Coins.

In this way, other Extreme Path creatures would not kidnap his bloodline descendants, it was not worth it.

The reason why that Extreme Dao creature sold all of his treasures was a good thing was because one of the treasures was the Extreme Dao Monument, and it was the Thunder Extreme Dao Monument.

If Ye Tian saw the Thunder Pole Dao Monument, he could copy it.

Not only that, but there are also many precious treasures.

"This is an opportunity, with the Thunder Pole Dao Monument, I can quickly improve the Thunder Pole Dao, and it will not be difficult to ascend to the consummation realm in the future!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In the blink of an eye, several eternal years passed.

On this day, Ye Tian went to Lei Ze Mountain in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, which was the lair of the Extreme Dao creature and the location of this public sale.

When Ye Tian came here, he saw a lot of Extreme Dao creatures, and among them, there were many Perfect Masters of the True Realm.

As for the Extreme Realm Perfect Master, he didn't see it.

Obviously, the sale of a Extreme Dao Creature at the peak of the Ultimate Realm Perfection Controller could not attract a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller.

After all, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea are extremely wealthy, but they are not comparable to those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the end of the world.

After entering Lei Ze Mountain, Ye Tian began to wait for the start of the sales meeting.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's expression was overjoyed, he had been turning on the copying talent, and just now he had actually sensed an Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu.

What a bonus!
